args: project_root="$PWD"; plugin_root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-$PWD}"; cd "$plugin_root" || exit 1; env_args=(); if [ -f "$project_root/.env" ]; then env_args=(--env-file "$project_root/.env"); elif [ -f .env ]; then env_args=(--env-file .env); fi; exec uv run "${env_args[@]}" -- fastmcp run fastmcp.json --no-banner
